case_title: WESCO SALES COMPANY VS SMITH HAROLD

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY WESCO SALES COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH HAROLD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH HAROLD

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WESCO SALES COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH HAROLD $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $820.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $9.00 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH HAROLD
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH HAROLD
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH HAROLD
